name: the view shows summary over the live tail, with a way to reply
note: folded turns appear as the summary; the live tail and a send form are present

name: identity renders from the latest self.identity

payload.text: I am self, a sovereign system you grow by talking.

expect_contains: I am self, a sovereign system you grow by talking
note: self's standing identity is a visible, data-backed page

name: a message becomes a user turn
note: chat records the user's words as a turn before — and regardless of — the brain's reply; checkable in the brain-free verify sandbox, where the brain call fails fast and the user turn is still emitted

name: folding never deletes raw turns
asserts: emits a chat.compaction {summary, through_seq} and appends no event that removes or rewrites any chat.message; all raw turns remain in the log after compaction
note: brain-dependent (the summary is written by the brain); checked live during growth, not by static replay
